hero.headline: Frontend Engineer
hero.description: Building high-performance web applications, cross-platform mobile apps, and workflow automations using React, Next.js, React Native, and other modern technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: Developer Specializing in Web, Mobile, and Automation
about.p1: I'm a developer focused on building interactive web applications, high-performance cross-platform mobile apps, and custom workflow automations.
about.p2: My primary stack spans the React ecosystem—including Next.js for scalable web apps and React Native for seamless mobile experiences. Additionally, I design and implement automated workflows and integrate robust backends to create cohesive end-to-end solutions.
about.p3: I love turning complex requirements into clean, maintainable, and production-ready applications that optimize efficiency and deliver real value.
about.lets_connect: Let's connect or just say Hi
about.capability_web_desc: Crafting highly interactive, responsive, and performance-optimized web applications and dashboard systems using React, Next.js, and modern CSS frameworks.
about.capability_mobile_desc: Building seamless, cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native, focusing on smooth performance and offline-first systems.
about.capability_auto_desc: Developing smart chatbot assistants, custom automation workflows, data scraping scripts, and workflow integrations connecting APIs to streamline business processes.

footer.title: Let's talk or build awesome things together!
footer.desc: I'm actively seeking opportunities as a Frontend Engineer. Feel free to reach out to me for collaborations, inquiries, or just to say hello.
